title: Shimla、Himachal Pradesh — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Shimla、Himachal Pradesh的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Shimla是Himachal Pradesh的一個城市，人口約170,000。The summer capital of British India, a charming Himalayan hill station with colonial architecture, scenic views, and the Kalka-Shimla railway.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
